name: test_should_construct_local_date_time[{year: 1984, week: 10, dayOfWeek: 3, hour: 12, minute: 31, second: 14, millisecond: 645}-'1984-03-07T12:31:14.645']

statusDetails.message:
gdm_tck.exceptions.ResultComparisonError: Results do not match (any order comparison)
Expected: [{'result': '1984-03-07T12:31:14.645'}]
Actual:   [{'result': '1984-01-01T12:31:14.000000000'}]
statusDetails.trace:
E   gdm_tck.exceptions.ResultComparisonError: Results do not match (any order comparison)
    Expected: [{'result': '1984-03-07T12:31:14.645'}]
    Actual:   [{'result': '1984-01-01T12:31:14.000000000'}]

parameters.name: _pytest_bdd_example
